section_miscategorizations.text: Lift the patient's right leg. Lift legs. The doctor will lift the patient's right leg. The doctor will lift the patient's legs.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These describe elements of the physical exam maneuver (e.g., straight leg raise) rather than future orders, treatments, or instructions. As written, they read as exam actions/observations and belong with exam findings, not the management plan.
